creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Thank you Yuri,

I have one question: shouldn't we use the new URL instead?

$ GET -dS https://github.com/SimonSapin/python-webencodings 
GET https://github.com/SimonSapin/python-webencodings
301 Moved Permanently
GET https://github.com/gsnedders/python-webencodings
200 OK
